understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) by falling through passages created by gravity and clicks, landing safely on support tiles while avoiding spikes (u/v).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Player only inputs MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT or CLICK on breakables; after each horizontal move gravity pulls until solid ground, hazards, or goal; clicks remove x tiles and don't cost movement steps; spikes instantly kill; UNDO reverts the last action; corridor_scan flags passages where further falls occur.
